category_sources: source_facts.description says SuiteSparse is a suite of sparse matrix software; official project page describes sparse matrix algorithms.
display_name_sources: Official SuiteSparse project page and official GitHub repository use SuiteSparse.
docs_sources: Official Tim Davis SuiteSparse page is the project page and documentation hub; official GitHub README provides source documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/DrTimothyAldenDavis/SuiteSparse; per instruction not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official SuiteSparse page lists GraphBLAS, CHOLMOD, SPQR, UMFPACK, and other sparse matrix algorithms.
